jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Housing.com
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com family as a Frontend Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
jsonLd.skills: JavaScript, Machine Learning, AWS, MongoDB, CI/CD, Python, SQL, TypeScript
